title: lavandula stricta var. humbertii
intro: Lavandula stricta var. humbertii, also known as Lavender Stricta, is a variant of the Lavandula stricta species, a shrubby perennial plant native to the island of Madagascar, characterized by its small purple flowers and fragrant foliage. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lavandula stricta var. humbertii include its ability to promote relaxation, reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Lavender Stricta can be prepared as an herbal tea, essential oil, or dried flowers for use in aromatherapy, skincare, and other natural remedies.
